summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solaris Films website iteration 2. All new sections (FocusTecnici, LoSapeviChe, FAQ, CaseStudy, References) render correctly. Safety Shield added as second main product. LCD Switch and Fotocromatiche removed from Services, Servizi page, Preventivo dropdown, and backend API. One issue found: LCD mention remains in Testimonials component.

ui_bugs.issue: LCD mention still present in testimonial quote: 'Le pellicole LCD hanno rivoluzionato le nostre sale riunioni'

action_items: Update Testimonials.jsx line 12 to remove LCD mention - replace with Safety Shield or another product testimonial

Chatbot system message updated to not mention LCD/Fotocromatiche

One fix needed: Testimonials.jsx line 12 LCD mention.
